free_text: Isobaric analogue states of 47Ca
The 4 MeV Van de Graaff accelerator was
used.
Two silicon surface barrier detectors and
a 2*256 pulse-height analyser were used.
The 46Ca target with natural relative abundance of
Ca - 0.0033% was used. The thickness in 46Ca was about
15 ug/cm2. The isotopic purity was better than 99%.
Inhomogeneities in the target thickness made it
necessary to measure relative yields in two angles.
SD: Corrections in all Subents.
